heading: Establishment of Unit
label: 430f–8 Establishment of Unit
notes: Amendments2007—Subsec. (b)(1). added par. (1) and struck out former par. (1) which read as follows: “the tract consisting of approximately 20 acres generally depicted as ‘Battery Robinett Boundary’ on the Map; and”.Pub. L. 110–161
amendments: Amendments2007—Subsec. (b)(1). added par. (1) and struck out former par. (1) which read as follows: “the tract consisting of approximately 20 acres generally depicted as ‘Battery Robinett Boundary’ on the Map; and”.Pub. L. 110–161

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is established in the States of Mississippi and Tennessee the Corinth Unit of the Shiloh National Military Park.
approximately 950 acres, as generally depicted on the Map; and

children.label: A
children.text: is under the ownership of a public entity or nonprofit organization; and

children.label: B
children.text: has been identified by the Siege and Battle of Corinth National Historic Landmark Study, dated .January 8, 1991

children.heading: Availability of Map
children.label: c Availability of Map
children.text: The Map shall be on file and available for public inspection in the office of the Director of the National Park Service.
